description: Assist team is very professional, responsive, and friendly and this app is very convenient when partnered with Quickbooks.
author: Abhishek S.
pros: This app helped me save a lot of time and efforts and provide clients with faster turnaround. I genuinely recommend this app to anyone who needs it.
cons: At the moment, there’s nothing I would change or point out as a negative. Everything was very smooth and easy. I didn't face any issues in using Assist.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The Approval Matrix is the game-changer
description: the overall experience is good, and the demo and support systems in placed were great. I would definitely recommend ASSIST to my clients and business-owners network.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: The competitive edge of ASSIST is definitely the Approval Matrix. For back-office professionals processing payments, the approval matrix cuts down their processing time and makes the payment turnaround faster and more efficient.
cons: the linking process to a desktop license accounting software is a tad difficult, especially for old licenses
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great tool to simplify you daily bookkeeping workflows
description: I can definitely recommend ASSIST.biz, especially when you run a bookkeeping or accounting business and deal with several companies/clients on a regular basis.
author: Susanne K.
pros: I like how simple the ASSIST platform is to navigate. It really improves the workflow and simplifies entering receipts and invoices. The inbuilt AI extraction works really well and saves me a lot of time. It also alerts you when you enter the same invoice or receipt twice, which helps to always have the correct amounts for your reporting.
cons: It sometimes takes some time to upload receipts and invoices, it seems a bit slow but I do understand it does the AI extraction at the same time.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: It is more convenient when I upload a bill in assist since it go straight as open bill. Also Supplier name is required in Assist prior to publishing, thus avoiding duplicate Contacts appearing in Quickbooks
author: Julie Anne O.
pros: This app is very convenient when partnered with Quickbooks
cons: Not available on google playstore/Apple appstore yet.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Supportive and Smooth Experience with ASSIST
description: "My overall experience with ASSIST was very positive. The team was professional, efficient, and always willing to help. They communicated clearly and responded quickly whenever I had questions or concerns, which made things a lot easier. I appreciated how organized everything was and how smoothly the process went from start to finish. It really felt like they cared about providing a good experience and were genuinely supportive throughout. I’m grateful for the help and would definitely recommend them."
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: "What I appreciated most about ASSIST was the team’s professionalism, responsiveness, and friendly attitude. They were always quick to assist and made the entire process feel smooth and manageable. Communication was clear, and I felt supported every step of the way. It was easy to trust that they had things handled, which really reduced a lot of stress. Overall, it felt like they genuinely cared about creating a positive experience, and that level of support meant a lot."
cons: "At the moment, there’s nothing I can say I disliked about ASSIST. My experience was smooth and positive throughout. The team was responsive, professional, and helpful at every stage. I didn’t encounter any major issues or concerns worth mentioning. Everything was handled well, and I felt supported the entire time. If anything comes up in the future, I’d be happy to share, but for now, there’s nothing I would change or point out as a negative."
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Assist.biz has great potential, and with these enhancements, it could become an even more powerful tool for managing invoices and bills
author: Sunil K.
pros: Assist.biz has been largely positive, particularly with the successful upload of bills and invoices directly into Xero. The website is user-friendly and effective for my needs.
cons: There are several areas for improvement .Account and tax columns, clearer currency handling instructions feature is not available.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Integration with Xero works very well. The automated data capture saves our finance team a lot of time, especially for recurring vendor invoices.
author: Rory R.
pros: - Seamless Xero integration - Auto-capture key invoice details - Reduces manual bookkeeping
cons: - Mobile version could be improved - Might take time to set up complex approval flows
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: With Assist it was overall good experience as it help in creating the invoices and bills in the software.
author: Stuti G.
pros: Assist help in creating the bills and invoices by Integrating and uploading in the accounting software like quickbook online and xero. So this make our work easy and accurate.
cons: In the assist when we upload the bills or invoices it does not provide all the fields so we need to go to the software and edit the invoice or bills.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Overall, Assist.biz shows great potential, and with a few enhancements, it could become an even more powerful tool for managing invoices and bills.
author: Anuj S.
pros: In the assist app All images and PDFs are correctly uploaded, and they appeared in the draft section of accounting software, whether as bills or invoices.
cons: In assist app, there is no option to specify account codes for expenses or income, nor is there a tax column
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: W Mohd Faiz W.
pros: Easy to use, Easy to understand, The integration went well with very minimal effort. Highly recommended
cons: So far my experience with ASSIST all good
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: still happy with it. the accuracy is good and the additional BI has further improved its capabilities.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: they incorporated AI into ASSIST and it has improved more since then. Look forward to their further development
cons: none at the moment. so far they are adding practical solutions to the existing application. Good practice.

description: It pretty much saved most of bookkeepers time and money for business. It significantly reduced time of manually inputting data to the accounting software.
author: Juvan D.
pros: The description on each line items of receipt or invoice is completely captured.
cons: There are some issues noted with regards to the correct tax rate as sometimes it is not captured especially on Australian invoices/receipts
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Assist is the go-to Integration for AR & AP
description: I use Assist to push AR & AP into Xero from my email. Being able to manage my AR & AP from my inbox versus the old way of manually submitting all the information saves me time and money as a business owner.
author: Kyle K.
pros: It scrapes the data from bills/invoices seamlessly in all different file types. It's 99% accurate.
cons: Some types of AP, such as an AP aging report, Assist has some trouble reading, but for 99% of invoices it works flawlessly.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: offer lifetime free trial, good interface, easy, and provide Xero and Quickbook integration
author: Fachri M.
pros: Very easy and provide Xero and Quickbook integration
cons: so far better and cheaper than the other platforms
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: I am happy to see that this software is developed and I am looking forward for future improvements. This kind of software is very helpful to the bookkeepers and accountants just like me.
author: Moises B.
pros: Its OCR feature, its fast and realiable.
cons: Not all features that are needed by the bookkeeper are included.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
